Package com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

Class GenerateTextRequestBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.GenerateTextRequestBuilder
  • public class GenerateTextRequestBuilder
extends Object
    Builder for creating GenerateContentRequest instances specifically for generating text in a fluent and intuitive way.
    Since:
    0.0.2
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder​(GenerationResource generationResource)
      Constructor for the GenerateTextRequestBuilder.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GenerateContentRequest build()
      Builds a GenerateContentRequest instance specifically for generating text based on the configured parameters.
      GeminiResult execute()
      Executes the generateText request synchronously and returns the response.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder withCandidateCount​(Integer candidateCount)
      Sets the optional candidate count for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder withMaxOutputTokens​(Integer maxOutputTokens)
      Sets the optional maximum output tokens for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder withSafetySetting​(SafetySetting safetySetting)
      Adds a safety setting to the list of safety settings for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder withSafetySettingForToxicity​(HarmBlockThresholdEnum harmBlockThreshold)
      Adds a safety setting for toxicity with the specified block threshold.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder withStopSequence​(String stopSequence)
      Adds a stop sequence to the list of stop sequences for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder withTemperature​(Double temperature)
      Sets the optional temperature for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder withTopK​(Integer topK)
      Sets the optional topK value for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder withTopP​(Double topP)
      Sets the optional topP value for the text generation request.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder withUserInput​(String userInput)
      Sets the required user input (text prompt) for the text generation request.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • GenerateTextRequestBuilder

        public GenerateTextRequestBuilder​(GenerationResource generationResource)
        Constructor for the GenerateTextRequestBuilder.
        Parameters:
        generationResource - The GenerationResource instance.

    • Method Detail

      • withUserInput

        public GenerateTextRequestBuilder withUserInput​(String userInput)
        Sets the required user input (text prompt) for the text generation request.
        Parameters:
        userInput - The user's input text prompt.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withTemperature

        public GenerateTextRequestBuilder withTemperature​(Double temperature)
        Sets the optional temperature for the text generation request.
        Parameters:
        temperature - The temperature to use for generation.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withCandidateCount

        public GenerateTextRequestBuilder withCandidateCount​(Integer candidateCount)
        Sets the optional candidate count for the text generation request.
        Parameters:
        candidateCount - The number of candidate responses to return.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withMaxOutputTokens

        public GenerateTextRequestBuilder withMaxOutputTokens​(Integer maxOutputTokens)
        Sets the optional maximum output tokens for the text generation request.
        Parameters:
        maxOutputTokens - The maximum number of tokens to include in a candidate.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withTopP

        public GenerateTextRequestBuilder withTopP​(Double topP)
        Sets the optional topP value for the text generation request.
        Parameters:
        topP - The maximum cumulative probability of tokens to consider when sampling.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withTopK

        public GenerateTextRequestBuilder withTopK​(Integer topK)
        Sets the optional topK value for the text generation request.
        Parameters:
        topK - The maximum number of tokens to consider when sampling.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withStopSequence

        public GenerateTextRequestBuilder withStopSequence​(String stopSequence)
        Adds a stop sequence to the list of stop sequences for the text generation request.
        Parameters:
        stopSequence - The stop sequence to add.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withSafetySetting

        public GenerateTextRequestBuilder withSafetySetting​(SafetySetting safetySetting)
        Adds a safety setting to the list of safety settings for the text generation request.
        Parameters:
        safetySetting - The safety setting to add.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withSafetySettingForToxicity

        public GenerateTextRequestBuilder withSafetySettingForToxicity​(HarmBlockThresholdEnum harmBlockThreshold)
        Adds a safety setting for toxicity with the specified block threshold.
        Parameters:
        harmBlockThreshold - The harm block threshold for toxicity.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • build

        public GenerateContentRequest build()
        Builds a GenerateContentRequest instance specifically for generating text based on the configured parameters.
        Returns:
        The built GenerateContentRequest instance.
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - If the user input is not set.

      • execute

        public GeminiResult execute()
                     throws GeminiApiException,
                            JsonException,
                            HttpException
        Executes the generateText request synchronously and returns the response.
        Returns:
        The GeminiResult from the Gemini API.
        Throws:
        GeminiApiException - If an error occurs during the API request.
        JsonException - If an error occurs during JSON processing.
        HttpException
